hero.subtitle: Where Swiss precision meets natural beauty. Premium clinic in Lugano, Ticino.

philosophy.body1: At Luxury Dental & Facial Estética, we believe that exceptional results come from the intersection of scientific precision and artistic sensitivity.
philosophy.body2: Our philosophy is rooted in Swiss minimalism — removing the unnecessary, enhancing the essential, and delivering results that stand the test of time. Every smile we design is guided by a deep respect for natural beauty.

pillars.title: Swiss Precision
pillars.description: Every treatment is executed with meticulous attention to detail, combining clinical excellence with artistic vision for results that are flawless and enduring.

pillars.title: Natural & Harmonious Beauty
pillars.description: We enhance your natural features, creating results that are harmonious, balanced, and authentically you — never overdone, always refined.

pillars.title: Digital Dentistry
pillars.description: Advanced 3D imaging and digital smile design technology allow us to preview and plan your transformation before any treatment begins.

pillars.title: Personalized Care
pillars.description: Each treatment plan is uniquely yours — designed around your goals, anatomy, and aesthetic vision, with zero compromise on quality.

treatments.title: Digital Smile Design
treatments.description: Advanced 3D digital planning that lets you preview your perfect smile before any treatment begins. Precision-engineered for flawless outcomes.

treatments.title: Clear Aligners
treatments.description: Invisible orthodontic treatment using precision-crafted aligners for a perfect bite and beautiful smile. Discreet, comfortable, and effective.

treatments.title: Mouth Guards
treatments.description: Custom-fitted protective guards for athletes and those with bruxism, engineered for maximum comfort and long-term protection.

treatments.title: Essix Retainers
treatments.description: Ultra-thin, crystal-clear retainers that maintain your smile alignment with undetectable precision after orthodontic treatment.

treatments.title: Sleep Dentistry
treatments.description: Comfortable dental care under conscious sedation for a completely anxiety-free treatment experience. Rest while we perfect your smile.

treatments.title: Porcelain Veneers
treatments.description: Ultra-thin, custom-crafted porcelain shells that create a luminous, flawless smile. The gold standard in cosmetic dental transformation.

treatments.title: Teeth Whitening
treatments.description: Professional-grade whitening delivering dramatically brighter, more youthful results in a single session. Safe, fast, and lasting.

facial.body: Our facial aesthetic treatments combine the latest medical advances with a deep understanding of natural beauty, delivering transformative results with zero compromise.

services.title: Facial Cleansing
services.description: Medical-grade deep cleansing protocols that purify pores, restore skin balance, and create the perfect canvas for advanced treatments.

services.title: Skin Rejuvenation
services.description: Advanced treatments stimulating cellular renewal with cutting-edge technology for visibly younger, more radiant, and luminous skin.

services.title: Facial Harmony
services.description: Precision treatments that enhance facial proportions and create balanced, harmonious aesthetics — tailored to your unique bone structure.

services.title: Anti-Aging Treatments
services.description: Comprehensive protocols addressing fine lines, volume loss, and skin laxity with medical precision and an artist's eye for natural results.

services.title: Hydration Therapies
services.description: Intensive hydration protocols that restore moisture, luminosity, and suppleness at the deepest cellular level for lasting radiance.

members.bio: Founder and Medical Director of Luxury Dental Paradiso. Expert in surgical and restorative dentistry, Digital Smile Design, and full-mouth rehabilitation with a holistic approach to oral health and beauty.
Specialist in conservative and prosthetic dentistry. Expert in porcelain veneers, clear aligner therapy, and precision restorations that combine function with aesthetic excellence.
Ensures that every patient journey is seamless, from the first consultation to aftercare. Dedicated to delivering a luxury experience at every touchpoint of your visit.

items.text: The transformation is absolutely remarkable. The team understood exactly what I envisioned — and then delivered something even more beautiful. My smile is now my greatest source of confidence.
I was hesitant about veneers, but the team was incredibly reassuring. The results are so natural — everyone assumes I was simply born with this smile. Truly exceptional craftsmanship.
After 14 months with clear aligners, my bite and smile are perfectly aligned. Seeing the digital preview before starting gave me complete confidence. A life-changing experience.
The facial rejuvenation was subtle, natural, and beautifully done. My colleagues thought I had returned from a restorative holiday. The results speak for themselves.
Professional whitening in one session gave me results I had wanted for years. The clinic environment is stunning, the team exceptional. Completely worth every franc.
I drove from Como specifically for this clinic after seeing their work. Not disappointed — the attention to detail and the personalised approach are unlike anything I had experienced before.
The entire journey was seamless — from the first digital preview to the final result. The team made me feel cared for at every step. My smile is now something I love to share.
As someone who works in design, I appreciate precision and beauty. This team delivers both. The veneers are flawless — they look more natural than my original teeth ever did.

gallery.body: Drag or use arrow keys to reveal each transformation. Every result reflects our commitment to precision and natural beauty.

facial.q: What facial aesthetic treatments do you offer?
facial.a: We offer deep facial cleansing, skin rejuvenation, facial harmony, anti-aging treatments, and hydration therapies. Each protocol is individually designed based on your skin type, facial structure, and aesthetic goals.
The vast majority of our facial treatments are minimally invasive and performed with topical anaesthetic when needed. Most patients describe the experience as comfortable and relaxing.

facial.q: How long do the results last?
facial.a: Results vary by treatment: hydration therapies provide immediate benefits that improve over time, while treatments such as facial harmony can last 12 to 18 months. We outline the recommended maintenance during your personalised consultation.

facial.q: From what age can these treatments be performed?
facial.a: There is no strict minimum age; the indication depends on each patient's individual needs. We perform a full assessment at the initial consultation to determine the most suitable protocol for you.

facial.q: How much recovery time do I need?
facial.a: Most facial treatments require no downtime. You can return to normal activities immediately. More intensive treatments may result in mild redness for 24 to 48 hours.

facial.q: How often should I repeat the treatments?
facial.a: The frequency depends on the treatment and your goals. We generally recommend an assessment every 3 to 6 months for maintenance treatments. Your doctor will design a personalised follow-up plan.

dental.a: Digital Smile Design is an advanced methodology combining clinical photography, facial analysis, and specialist software to create a precise 3D preview of your new smile before any treatment begins. You can approve every detail before a single tooth is touched.
Porcelain veneers are a long-lasting aesthetic solution that can last 10 to 20 years with proper care. They offer exceptional longevity compared with other cosmetic dental options.

dental.q: How long does treatment with clear aligners take?
dental.a: Duration varies according to case complexity, but generally ranges from 6 to 18 months. During the diagnostic consultation we perform a full analysis and present you with a digital simulation of the final result.

dental.q: Does professional teeth whitening damage enamel?
dental.a: No. Clinically supervised professional whitening uses controlled, safe concentrations of peroxide that do not damage enamel. It is significantly safer and more effective than over-the-counter whitening products.

dental.q: How does aesthetic dentistry differ from conventional dentistry?
dental.a: Aesthetic dentistry combines clinical precision with artistic sensitivity to optimise both the function and appearance of your smile. At Luxury Dental, every treatment is designed with your facial proportions, skin tone, and personality in mind.

dental.q: What guarantees do you offer on results?
dental.a: We include post-treatment follow-up with all procedures and offer a satisfaction guarantee. If the outcome does not meet the expectations agreed upon during digital planning, we revise it at no additional cost.

rehab.a: Full-mouth rehabilitation is a comprehensive approach that simultaneously restores chewing function, dental aesthetics, and general oral health. It is indicated when multiple teeth are affected, there is severe enamel wear, loss of vertical dimension, or bite problems requiring global reconstruction.

rehab.q: How long does full-mouth rehabilitation take?
rehab.a: Time depends on case complexity. A full rehabilitation treatment can take 3 to 12 months, including diagnostic, provisional, and definitive phases. We present a detailed treatment plan with a timeline at the initial consultation.

Rehabilitation is indicated in cases of severe tooth wear from bruxism, loss of multiple teeth, functional temporomandibular joint (TMJ) problems, altered bites, or when a complete aesthetic transformation of the mouth is desired.

rehab.q: What materials do you use for restorations?
rehab.a: We use exclusively state-of-the-art materials: high-strength ceramics (lithium disilicate, zirconia), high-aesthetic composite resins, and biocompatible alloys. All materials comply with European quality and biocompatibility regulations.

rehab.q: Can I combine rehabilitation with aesthetic treatments?
rehab.a: Absolutely. At Luxury Dental we integrate functional rehabilitation with Digital Smile Design to achieve the best possible aesthetic and functional outcome. The final result is a smile that not only functions perfectly but also looks impeccable.

rehab.q: Do you have options for patients with dental anxiety?
rehab.a: Yes. We offer conscious sedation for all rehabilitative procedures, allowing extensive treatments to be completed in greater comfort and with fewer appointments. Our team is trained to make every visit a calm and positive experience.
